heading: Funding for scholarship program for advanced English language studies by heritage community citizens
label: 1912 Funding for scholarship program for advanced English language studies by heritage community citizens
notes: Amendments2020—Subsec. (a). , substituted “for each of fiscal years 2005 through 2021” for “for each fiscal year, beginning with fiscal year 2005,”.Pub. L. 116–260, § 619(c)(1)Subsec. (b). , added subsec. (b). Former subsec. (b) redesignated (c).Pub. L. 116–260, § 619(c)(3)Subsec. (c). , (4), redesignated subsec. (b) as (c) and substituted “this section” for “subsection (a)”.Pub. L. 116–260, § 619(c)(2)

L. 116–260, § 619(c)(2)

children.heading: Funding from Intelligence Community Management Account
children.label: a Funding from Intelligence Community Management Account
children.text: In addition to amounts that may be made available to the Secretary under the Fund for a fiscal year, the Director of National Intelligence shall transfer to the Secretary from amounts appropriated for the Intelligence Community Management Account for each of fiscal years 2005 through 2021 $2,000,000 to carry out the scholarship programs for English language studies by certain heritage community citizens under .section 1902(a)(1)(E) of this title

children.heading: Fiscal years beginning with fiscal year 2022
children.label: b Fiscal years beginning with fiscal year 2022
children.text: In addition to amounts that may be made available to the Secretary under the Fund for a fiscal year, there is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary for each fiscal year, beginning with fiscal year 2022, $2,000,000, to carry out the scholarship programs for English language studies by certain heritage community citizens under .section 1902(a)(1)(E) of this title

children.heading: Availability of funds
children.label: c Availability of funds
children.text: Amounts made available under this section shall remain available until expended.
